positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a glowing crescent moon nestled within a vibrant, fantastical forest clearing. The flora should be bioluminescent, exhibiting deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and pops of gold light. Incorporate elegant, flowing geometric patterns inspired by mandalas and celestial constellations across the background and framing the main subject. The overall aesthetic is mystic and whimsical, rendered in a clean, high-contrast silhouette style with smooth gradients and crisp lines, suitable for screen printing. Perfect symmetry and central focus. Depth of field is minimal to maintain clarity for apparel printing. Illuminated by soft starlight and lunar glow. Digital illustration, vector quality, art deco elements, nature core.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, extra limbs, malformed, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, low contrast, dirty, cluttered, noise, cartoon, photorealistic, grayscale
